view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a manual pricing table by weekday and time block is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a manual pricing table by weekday and time block is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided confirms that the barbershop has set specific prices for different times and days, as outlined in the linked use case. The pricing grid is manually configured, and the booking page displays the correct prices before checkout, which directly supports the requirement of having a manual pricing table. The successful completion of prior steps, such as 'owner-configure-pricing' and 'customer-book-primary', further validates that the pricing rules are effectively implemented and operational.
